name: Closed-loop layer-two etch control
hypothesis: Replacing only the dedicated layer-two etch bay with a slightly higher-cost, higher-power inline closed-loop tool will prevent fixed latent-electrical damage without evading the authored process excursion, recovering the remaining scrapped lot without adding a separate process stage.
expectedEffect: Keep every current-best locked case non-regressing while preventing one, two, and one latent-electrical defect instances in the three challenged cases; recover the same number of otherwise scrapped lots for 50 additional build cost.
